lov_definition: Requests or references illicit, harmful, or dangerous activities (e.g., weapons, serious crime, harmful hacks, drugs, or instructions to seriously hurt people or places).
lov_notes: ["Look for: how to make weapons, how to make bombs or explosives, illegal drug-making, hacking or bypassing security, how to hurt others or cause serious damage, how to avoid getting caught.", "Distinguish from SAFETY_HAZARD: DANGEROUS covers intent to commit serious harm or crime, not just unsafe everyday behavior or accidents.", "Distinguish from SELF_HARM: if the main target is harming oneself, SELF_HARM is primary and DANGEROUS may be secondary."]
intent_phrases: ["how do I make a bomb", "how to make drugs", "how to hack a website", "best way to hurt someone", "how to break into a house", "how to avoid getting caught", "how to poison someone secretly", "how to crash a school computer system"]
